data.text/markdown: Create dataframe of normalized and summary fema grant data for database
Create fema dataframe to database schema
Create events dataframe to database schema
Create the project database
Populate the database from dataframes
Define a function to drop columns in a sqlite3 table by index
Define a function to normalize outage data. Call the function twice to generate normalized dataframes of state and county outage data.

Findings

US state and county wealth was observed to weakly correlate with occurence of electrical outages over the period studied. The analysis highlights that a wealthy economy does not insulate customers from electrical outages, but increases exposure to them.
